# copycat

Read [README.md](../README.md) for product introduction.


## Constraints

- Respect the skill karpathy-guidelines.
- Make little assumptions, and ask for clarification if needed. If certain details are not provided, provide high level answer or use placeholders in code.
- Do not run extra commands to perform tasks that I didn't ask for, such as syntax check, linting or code test.
- If commands are necessary to run to get information, do it conservatively and explain why it's necessary.

## Design

- cli: check [cli.md](../docs/cli.md)
- server: check [server.md](../docs/server.md)
